key_contradictions.testimony: I personally confirmed the start of the IV antibiotic protocol at 19:45.
key_contradictions.evidence_contradiction: The Medication Administration Record (MAR) shows zero antibiotic dosage entries until 10:15 the following morning.
key_contradictions.impeachment_question: Doctor, you testified that you 'personally confirmed' the start of antibiotics at 19:45. Can you explain why the hospital's own electronic MAR, which timestamped in real-time, shows no such administration occurred for the next 14 hours?

key_contradictions.evidence_contradiction: ER Triage record notes qSOFA score of 2 at 18:30, indicating high risk for poor outcome and need for immediate critical care escalation.
